item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:country","verdict":"ACCEPT","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":true,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering preserves the criterial core of a very large inhabited place unified under one authority and conceived by its people as one, while the lossy flag accurately discloses omitted statehood features."}
